cases.desc: leading-dot is NOT a number per ABNF; treated as plain-string
leading -. is NOT a number per ABNF; treated as plain-string
trailing-dot is NOT a number per ABNF; treated as plain-string
leading + is NOT a number per ABNF; treated as plain-string
leading +. is NOT a number per ABNF; treated as plain-string
leading-dot with exponent is NOT a number; treated as plain-string
exponent without digits is NOT a number; treated as plain-string
exponent with sign but no digits is NOT a number; treated as plain-string
comment inside data tuple is forbidden
True (capitalised) is a string, not boolean
